Kirran Mirrah  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded April 27th, 2014 by wiscookie
Updated April 28th, 2014

  • This mob spawns at -369, +1653, +59.52 in the first hut on the left when coming from Toxxulia Forest.
  • Class: Wizard
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

Categories: EverQuest | Wizard (EQ Mob Class) | Templatized
This page last modified 2022-06-25 10:24:23.

Minimum Level: 15
Maximum Level: 16
Expansion:
Effects Used:Fire Bolt
Frost Bolt
Root
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2022-06-25 10:22:58
Items Given:
Karran's Head

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Increased:
  Craftkeepers +10
  Deepwater Knights +10
  Crimson Hands +10
  Gate Callers +10
Factions Decreased:
  Heretics -10
Quests:
  Cat Courier

Report a correction

Post Comment
Faction hits for kill
QuoteReply
# May 07 2017 at 6:38 AM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts
[Sun May 07 08:36:43 2017] Your faction standing with Heretics has been adjusted by -10.
[Sun May 07 08:36:43 2017] Your faction standing with Deepwater Knights has been adjusted by 10.
[Sun May 07 08:36:43 2017] Your faction standing with Gate Callers has been adjusted by 10.
[Sun May 07 08:36:43 2017] Your faction standing with Craftkeepers has been adjusted by 10.
[Sun May 07 08:36:43 2017] Your faction standing with Crimson Hands has been adjusted by 10.
[Sun May 07 08:36:43 2017] You slash Kirran Mirrah for 329 points of damage.
[Sun May 07 08:36:43 2017] You have slain Kirran Mirrah!
▲ Page top
Faction hits for kill
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2025 at 1:09 AM Rating: Good
LRchantrae
Scholar
24 posts
Text
Sythik wrote:
After killing 25 place holders of a kerran awrat at location -365, +1650 in the first hut to the left as you enter through the tunnel, Kirran Mirrah finally spawned. It is about a 12 minute spawn time.

Edited, Feb 19th 2014 12:03pm by Sythik


Thanks Sythik,
I would have never found this fellow without your post. I hope you're still playing EQ.

Edited, Jan 13th 2017 9:55pm by Vrool [/quote]

Thanks again for posting this, it will surely save other's sanity, along with mine. :)

Chantrae

After killing 25 place holders of a kerran awrat at location -365, +1650 in the first hut to the left as you enter through the tunnel, Kirran Mirrah finally spawned. It is about a 12 minute spawn time.

Edited, Feb 19th 2014 12:03pm by Sythik

▲ Page top
kirran mirrah
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2005 at 11:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783411874
2 posts
Don't know where these TWO guys came from, but at least one of them has ROOT as well.

Same story as Ironstone above - usual hunting of rats SEVERELY disrupted. All other Kerrans are apprehensive, but I'm KOS to these two jerks. And one of them is patrolling my corpse . . .

▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2003 at 12:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570790351
12 posts
Today for the first time, I was attacked by him. I had never met him before.
Before I knew what hit me, I was at 50% (Druid level 18).
I could just escape.
I went back and saw him attacking a wharf rat. MY wharf rat, cause I camp here since I am level 15.
I attacked him with dot spells and went in melee.
He nearly killed me, I had 13% left.
He gave the following faction:

Heretics: worse
Deepwater Knights: better
Gate callers: better
Craftkeepers: better
Crimson Hands: better

During this fight, none of the other inhabitants started to fight with him, or against him.
▲ Page top
BAH!!
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2003 at 12:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257172610
2 posts
Ok this is beginning to be mentally damaging. Where the hell is this guy? That cat that is a reagular Awrat or whatever is NOT him. Not only would he not even take the bag I tried to give him (I'm doing the Cat Courior Quest) he attacked the holy heck ot of me as soon as I lost my invis, and he IS supposed to be amiable to all residents of Paineel as he is one of their informants. If anyone actually KNOWS what they are talking about and can post as to where Kirran Mirrah is, please post or e-mail me at holydragon@satx.rr.com I'd take the advice of a necromancer from Paineel that has done the quest over someone that thinks they know what they are talking about because they are of a high level...
▲ Page top
/loc
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2002 at 1:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249156466
73 posts
Spawns in the hut to the left as you come out of the zone tunnel. /loc is 392,-649. Even though green to my 23rd level wiz, attacked anyway. Nothing dropped, no faction hits when killed.
▲ Page top
Where is He?
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 11:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757179784
2 posts
I have a friend who is looking for a Kirran Mirrah for a quest. I noticed someone posted that his PH is a regular Kerran Awrat? Which one? Where at? Would love any help that anyone can offer. Many Thanks.

~Ryvrsong
~Loyal Bard of The Bristlebane Wolf Pack
▲ Page top
Not KoS to Everyone
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2000 at 1:52 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm a level 15 Paineel cleric and he was amiable. He was also blue to me.

Dominax
Seventh Hammer
▲ Page top
not kos to Erudite SK
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2001 at 5:34 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
He's not kos too me (12th season Erudite SK) either. Was warmly. Seems he likes all inhabitants of Paineel...
Was yellow to me btw, so he's 13 or 14.
▲ Page top
Class & Location
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2000 at 2:19 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749931919
Scholar
97 posts
Hes a wizard and casts lightning, fire and cold based spells. He can be found in the first hut left right after leaving the tunnel from Toxx. He has a huge aggro range and is KOS to everyone. To avoid him keep following on the right wall and the right side of the bridge. His PH is a regular kerran awrat.

Lenron
The Three Flames
Solusek Ro
▲ Page top
RE: Class & Location
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 10:30 PM Rating: Decent

25 posts
not KoS to everyone, my DE Cleric (Inny) is ally & she killed Kerrans for 4 levels :o\
